hero.label: Profile
hero.heading: Your profile
hero.noBio: No bio yet. Add a short intro below.

form.title: Edit profile
form.description: Keep your public profile current. Username changes affect how others find you.
form.usernameHelp: 3-30 characters, letters, numbers, and underscores only.
form.displayNameHelp: Optional. Shown on your profile and in shared spaces.

toast.updateFailed: Unable to update your profile right now.

quotas.heading: Usage quotas
quotas.description: Current daily counters and active room cap.

validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters.
validation.usernameMaxLength: Username must be 30 characters or fewer.
validation.usernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.

dangerZone.heading: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Soft-deleting your account will sign you out and disable future access.

deleteDialog.title: Delete account
deleteDialog.description: This will soft-delete your account, sign you out immediately, and prevent future access. Your historical records may still remain on the platform.

deleteToast.deleteFailed: Unable to delete your account right now.

avatar.invalidFile: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP images under 5MB are allowed.
